---
# title: |
#   Interfacing the Physical World: Hardware Interfaces and Serial Communication in Embedded Systems
#   <br><span class="subtitle">Computer Engineering Design Studio (CMPE 246)</span>
# author:
#   - name: Fei Wang
#     affiliation: <br>March 9, 2026
title: "Case Study: SPI-Driven Smoke Monitoring for Wildfire Detection"
format: 
    revealjs:
        theme: theme.scss
        margin: 0.04
        incremental: true  
        code-block-height: 300px
        menu: false
        slide-number: true
        revealjs-plugins:
          - chalkboard
---

{{< include slides/03-handle.md >}}
